full_text:
Chen Jiu 陳就
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Jiu (陳就). Chief Controller, led Huang Zu’s navy but was killed by Lü Meng. Chen Jiu was affiliated with Liu Biao. Chen Jiu lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
